leads.name: Aj's Home Furniture in Macon, GA
leads.snippet: At AJ's Home Furniture in Macon, GA, discover your ideal home oasis with our furniture collection. From stylish pieces to functional designs, find furniture that suits your taste and lifestyle. Visit us to explore quality and comfort for every corner of your home.

leads.name: Home - Bert Maxwell Furniture Macon, Georgia
leads.snippet: Bert Maxwell Furniture Company in downtown Macon, Georgia has six stories with a large selection of La-Z-Boy recliners, outdoor, bedroom and living room furniture, dining room sets, grandfather clocks, bedding, recliners, and accessories for every room in the house. We service and repair La-Z-Boy products. We are a family-owned business with over 100 years of experience serving Middle Georgia ...
